title: Auto-Smelting
description: Adds Auto-Smelting enchantment to the game!
body:
**What is Auto-Smelting?**

It is a small mod that adds auto-smelting to the game.



**Features**

_Mod Compability:_ It works almost with every mod ore that has an ingot.

It also can be used for sand and wood.



_Fortune:_ Fortune also increases the material depending on the chance.

This makes them very good when used at the same time.
